examples: Let me make just a few concluding remarks.
Well, I probably need to talk about flats a bit more in the concluding paragraphs, don't I?
His only vice is to get drunk on champagne after concluding a successful piece of business.
They ended at the same time, concluding with a long-held death stare aimed towards the other.
For New Zealand, "There is no time frame for concluding an agreement, " Mr. Key's spokeswoman said.
